question_en: What is a 'Museum Curator'? Is it just about cleaning old statues?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Museum Curator' kya hota hai? Kya iska kaam sirf purani murtiyon ko saaf karna hai?
answer_en: Not at all! A Curator is like a manager of history. They decide how to tell the story of our ancestors, organize exhibitions, and preserve artifacts using modern technology. In 2026, with the growth of cultural tourism in Chhattisgarh, Curators are the experts who keep our heritage alive for the world to see.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul nahi! Curator itihaas ka manager hota hai. Wo tay karta hai ki hamare purvajon ki kahani duniya ko kaise batayi jaye. 2026 mein Chhattisgarh mein 'Cultural Tourism' badhne se in experts ki bahut izzat hai jo hamari virasat ko duniya ke liye sanjo kar rakhte hain.

question_en: What is a 'Digital Archivist for Tribal History'?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Digital Archivist for Tribal History' kya hota hai?
answer_en: A Digital Archivist uses scanners and AI to record tribal songs, languages, and stories that aren't written in books. They save this knowledge in digital libraries so it’s never lost. In 2026, many global universities hire local experts from our state to help record this unique data for research.
answer_hi_hinglish: Digital Archivist scanners aur AI ka use karke hamare tribal geet, bhasha aur kahaniyon ko record karta hai jo kitabo mein nahi milte. Wo is gyan ko hamesha ke liye digital format mein surakshit rakhta hai. 2026 mein duniya bhar ki universities hamare state ke experts ko is kaam ke liye hire karti hain.

question_en: Can we sell our local Bastar Art or Millets to other countries? Who manages this?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya hum apna Bastar Art ya Millets videshon mein bech sakte hain? Ise kaun sambhalta hai?
answer_en: Yes! An 'Import-Export Manager' handles this. They understand international laws, shipping, and payments. In 2026, our local handicrafts and organic millets are in high demand in Europe and the US. A professional manager helps local artisans get global prices for their hard work.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan! Ise 'Import-Export Manager' sambhalta hai. Use videshi kanoon aur shipping ki samajh hoti hai. 2026 mein hamare Bastar Art aur Millets ki Europe aur America mein bahut demand hai. Ek professional manager hamare local kalakaron ko unki mehnat ka sahi aur bada paisa dilwane mein madad karta hai.

question_en: What is a 'Real-time Interpreter' for business?
question_hi_hinglish: Business mein 'Real-time Interpreter' ka kya kaam hota hai?
answer_en: When a foreign investor visits our state and doesn't know the local language, an Interpreter translates the conversation instantly. In 2026, with global companies setting up plants in Chhattisgarh, experts who know English and local dialects (like Chhattisgarhi or Gondi) are essential for high-level business deals.
answer_hi_hinglish: Jab koi videshi investor hamare state aata hai aur use local bhasha nahi aati, tab Interpreter unki baaton ko turant translate karta hai. 2026 mein badi companies ke Chhattisgarh aane se, aise experts ki bahut zaroorat hai jinhe English aur local bhasha dono aati ho.

question_en: My child loves sports and math. Is 'Sports Performance Analyst' a real job?
question_hi_hinglish: Mere bacche ko sports aur math pasand hai. Kya 'Sports Performance Analyst' koi asli naukri hai?
answer_en: It is a dream job! An Analyst uses data and video to help athletes improve their speed and technique. In 2026, even local sports academies use technology to train future stars. It’s a perfect mix of sports passion and mathematical skill that pays very well in professional leagues.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ye ek dream job hai! Analyst data aur video ke zariye players ko unki galtiyan batata hai aur unhe fast banata hai. 2026 mein hamari local academies bhi technology use kar rahi hain. Sports ke shauk aur math ke talent ko milakar ye ek bahut acchi salary wali job banti hai.

question_en: What does a 'Sports Nutritionist' do for local athletes?
question_hi_hinglish: Local players ke liye 'Sports Nutritionist' kya karta hai?
answer_en: A Sports Nutritionist creates special diet plans to give athletes more energy and faster recovery. In 2026, as more youth from our state compete at the national level, the demand for specialists who understand local food (like Pej or Dubki Kadi) and can balance it for sports performance is booming.
answer_hi_hinglish: Sports Nutritionist players ke liye khaas diet plan banata hai taaki unhe taqat mile. 2026 mein hamare state ke bacche national level par khel rahe hain, isliye aise specialists ki demand hai jo hamare local khane (jaise Pej) ko sports ke hisaab se balance kar sakein.

question_en: What is 'Freight Forwarding'? Is it a desk job or a field job?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Freight Forwarding' kya hai? Kya ye office ka kaam hai ya bahar ka?
answer_en: It is a mix of both. Freight Forwarders act as travel agents for cargo, ensuring goods reach from a village factory to an international port. In 2026, with the rise of air and rail cargo hubs in our region, this is a top-tier management career that keeps the global economy moving.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ye dono ka mix hai. Freight Forwarder saaman ke liye 'travel agent' ka kaam karta hai. Wo gaon ki factory se saaman ko videshi port tak pahunchata hai. 2026 mein hamare area mein cargo hubs banne se ye management ka ek bahut bada career ban chuka hai.

question_en: Can 'Cultural Tourism' be a business for a village youth group?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya 'Cultural Tourism' gaon ke yuvaon ke liye business ban sakta hai?
answer_en: Absolutely. A group of youth can start a 'Heritage Experience' business—taking tourists to see local festivals, craft making, and traditional dances. In 2026, tourists pay for 'authentic experiences,' and village youth are the best owners of these stories. It creates local jobs and keeps culture alive.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul. Gaon ke yuva milkar 'Heritage Experience' ka business shuru kar sakte hain—jahan wo tourists ko local tyohar aur kala dikha sakein. 2026 mein log asli cheezein dekhne ke paise dete hain. Isse gaon mein hi naukri milti hai aur hamari sanskriti bhi bachi rehti hai.
